title: RM6 5SS, EFC Green Concrete Technology UK Ltd: environmental permit issued - EPR/DP3243QN/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit for:    Operator name: EFC Green Concrete Technology UK Ltd   Installation name: EFC Green Concrete Technology UK Ltd   Permit number: EPR/DP3243QN/A001   "
